defaults.ticker: LIVEAVATARSTREAM3D  ·  A 3D TALKING-AVATAR STUDIO  ·  100% IN YOUR BROWSER  ·  NO RENDER SERVER

rundown.headline: Meet LiveAvatarStream3D
rundown.ticker: PRODUCT DEMO  ·  BROWSER-BASED 3D AVATAR STUDIO  ·  LIP-SYNCED  ·  CLIENT-SIDE EXPORT
bullets: A 3D talking-avatar studio that runs in the browser
No render farm and nothing to install
Write a script — a lip-synced presenter delivers it

beats.text: Good evening. Tonight, a look at LiveAvatarStream3D, a three-D talking-avatar studio that runs entirely in your browser.
No render farm, no installs. You write a script, and a lip-synced three-D presenter brings it to life.

rundown.headline: Direct It Like a Script
rundown.ticker: AUTHORING  ·  PLAIN-TEXT SCRIPT  ·  [EMOTION] [GESTURE] [CAMERA] TAGS  ·  DIRECTION AS DATA
bullets: Type your lines in plain text
Tag emotion, gesture, and camera inline
Direction is data — not a code change

beats.text: You author the performance as plain text. Type your lines, and tag them with emotion, gesture, and camera direction.
Want the anchor to smile, gesture to a chart, or push in for a close-up? It is all just direction in the script.

rundown.headline: Real-Time 3D, In the Browser
rundown.ticker: REAL-TIME  ·  THREE.JS  ·  BLENDSHAPE LIP-SYNC  ·  GESTURES + CAMERA MOVES  ·  PREVIEW = EXPORT
bullets: Rendered live with Three.js as it speaks
The preview is exactly what you export

beats.text: Powered by Three-J-S, the avatar renders live as it speaks, with blendshape lip-sync, gestures, and camera moves.
What you see in the preview is exactly what you get on export. One drive path, zero surprises.

rundown.headline: Export 4K — Client-Side
rundown.ticker: EXPORT  ·  1080P & 4K MP4  ·  WEBCODECS  ·  FRAME-EXACT  ·  NO GPU SERVER IN THE LOOP
bullets: Full 1080p or 4K MP4, frame by frame
Rendered in the browser with WebCodecs
No GPU server — it runs on your machine

beats.text: When you are happy, export a full ten-eighty-p or four-K M-P-4, rendered frame by frame in the browser with WebCodecs.
There is no G-P-U server in the loop. The render happens on your machine, even in a background tab.

rundown.headline: Your Voice. Your Avatars.
rundown.ticker: VOICE CLONING  ·  BRING YOUR OWN AVATARS  ·  CLOUD PROJECTS & ASSETS  ·  NEWSROOM-READY
bullets: Clone a voice; load your own rigged avatars
Projects and assets saved to the cloud
Headlines, tickers, graphics, and music built in

beats.text: Clone a voice, load your own rigged avatars, and the studio remembers your projects and assets in the cloud.
Headlines, tickers, wall graphics, and music beds. Everything a newsroom needs, built right in.

rundown.headline: Ready When You Are
rundown.ticker: FROM BLANK SCRIPT TO BROADCAST IN MINUTES  ·  THE STUDIO IS THE BROWSER  ·  THANKS FOR WATCHING
bullets: From a blank script to a finished clip in minutes
No pipeline, no servers to manage

beats.text: From a blank script to a broadcast-ready clip in minutes, with no pipeline required.
LiveAvatarStream3D. The studio is the browser. That is the demo. Thanks for watching.
